hotel_name: Khách sạn Boutique Thuấn Huê - Gần Vinpearl Nam Hội An (Thuấn Huê Boutique Hotel-Near Vinpearl Nam Hội An)

reviews.title: Ok
reviews.text: Seems to be the best option in this village. I had the ground floor apartment. Cleaning needs improvement. I think better choose rooms on the other floors up they seemed to be not that worn out.

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives:
We booked Thuan Hue for two nights because we were visiting VinWonders Hoi An with the kids.  The hotel is only a two minutes’ ride to the theme park. 

As a general starting comment, we were disappointed by our stay and are astonished by the high ratings.  

PROS: 
- Exceptional value
- ⁠Impossibly fast-drying tiles in the bathroom 
- ⁠Staff was friendly and made an effort to answer all our questions using translations apps

CONS:
- All pictures were taken with wide-angle lens (making rooms appear much bigger than they are); it’s not deception as square footage of rooms is clearly disclosed but just manage your expectations when you open the door
- ⁠All pictures are AI-enhanced; for instance, the promotional pictures have large palm trees in front of the hotel, giving a “resort feel”.  In reality, the palm trees are barely taller than a human and there is no open space in front of the hotel as the neighboring property is only a few meters away.  Female staff in photos were likely models hired for promotional purposes 
- ⁠Lobby has no air-conditioning (or they didn’t turn it on in April)
- ⁠Lobby “freezer” that sells ice cream is not cold enough; do not buy ice cream from hotel; go across the street to convenience store instead
- ⁠Towels were gross and looked ratty, even though hotel is relatively new 
- ⁠The general state of room was not clean (again, despite the beautiful photos); when we wiped the shelves, the floor, even inside of desk drawer, there was a layer of black dust.  We don’t expect laboratory-clean conditions when travelling, but this level of uncleanliness is also not acceptable 
- ⁠There were ants in our room and a few even got into the bed.  The hotel did offer to “use spray” to get rid of them for us but I didn’t want my kids breathing in the fumes or coming in contact with chemicals 

Final comments: you get what you pay for.  Hotel offers bang-for-the-buck but don’t expect a “miracle” deal.  There is no miracle and we would not stay here again.
reviews.negatives:
We booked Thuan Hue for two nights because we were visiting VinWonders Hoi An with the kids.  The hotel is only a two minutes’ ride to the theme park.

reviews.title: So far so good
reviews.text: Nothing to see/walk around in that area. Suggest day trip only. So far the hotel still quite new.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Buena

reviews.title: Need to pay more attention to hygiene.
reviews.text: I chose this hotel because the nearby resort was fully booked and I usually spend the whole day outside, only coming back to the hotel at night to rest, but I was really quite disappointed with the service here. Since I went during the winter, the room had a lot of damp smell; the first time I stepped into the room, I was quite shocked by the sour smell from the bedding, feeling like the hotel hadn’t changed the bed coverings because the bed looked very wrinkled at first. On the first night, I could hardly sleep, so the next day I called to ask the hotel for a replacement blanket, and a staff member brought me a new duvet cover, and I had to change it myself. And since it might be a family-run hotel, they don’t have daily cleaning service, which can be understood, but they need to pay more attention to basic room cleanliness.

reviews.title: Hotel Estupendo, 100% recomendado
reviews.positives: En General Todo. El Hotel muy bien decorado en una buena zona. El personal super amable. El desayuno también muy bueno. Las habitaciones eran muy amplias y en general el servicio espectacular

reviews.title: Before going to Nam Hoi An Vinpearl.
reviews.text: I arrived at 3 AM on a morning flight and went out early the next day. They waited until we checked in, and we called a Da Nang Goblin pickup at the airport. There were many local pho shops in front of the hotel! They are delicious!! The price for 3 adults and 1 child was around 30,000 won, which is good value for money!!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Au calme 
Confortable 
Commerce a proximité 
Piscine propre

reviews.title: near Vin wonder Nam Hoi An
reviews.text: The hotel is 2 km away from Vin Wonder Nam Hoi An. It's a boutique hotel, so it's rather small and basic. We booked 2 rooms, but one of them had an odor that made it hard to sleep. The staff are nice, polite, and helpful. The hotel does not include breakfast, but there are some restaurants nearby offering good local appetizers. You can ask the hotel staff for details.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Hotel que nous avons réservé pour une halte d'une nuit (voyage à vélo). L'hôtel est récent ; tout est propre.
La piscine est bien agréable.
reviews.negatives: Pas de petit déjeuner. Plusieurs restaurants dans la rue, repas locaux très bons mais difficile de se comprendre (pas d'anglais).

reviews.title: New hotel
reviews.text: I've been staying in Vietnam for a long time due to work, and I ended up looking for accommodations with kitchens. I booked a recently built place because it was affordable, but the results were disappointing. The transportation costs were incredibly high near the accommodation, and there were no motorbike rentals available nearby. As for restaurants? Is there really just one noodle shop? There are almost no dining options. There are a few massage places, and I went to one based on Google reviews saying they did good skin care, but it turned out to be a scam. The condition of the pool was poor, possibly because there were no guests using it. The entrance to the accommodation was dirty, with trash and clutter everywhere. I booked for three nights, and when I asked for a few more bottles of water, they charged me for them. Anyway, after this day, I no longer want to trust accommodation reviews.

reviews.title: Hôtel à ne pas manquer
reviews.positives: Chambre propre, grande avec tout le confort, grande salle de bain avec tout le nécessaire, eau chaude et grand balcon
reviews.negatives: Un tabouret pour deux personnes et sur la terrasse il manque une table et deux chaises

reviews.title: First Impression
reviews.text:
We booked the hotel with 2 adults and 5 children( 4 years- 14 years). We specifically asked for adjoining rooms. When we arrived the boy at the front desk told us that the 2 rooms were in different floors as they didn't have 2 rooms that we asked for adjoining.  I was totally annoyed as no communication was emailed to us about this problem prior to arriving. How do we have 5 children in a different floor.  We had trouble finding a hotel that would accommodate us with this request so I knew it was going to be hard to find another hotel and with my wife tied and 5 kids it wasn't going to happen.... They were not very accommodating in rectifying the problem so we ended up sleeping 5 kids and 1 adult in 1 room and 1 adult in a double queen room... not happy.... We booked this hotel to go to vin wonders the next day.... There is no food on site which we knew prior, but there is plenty on the street. 
7/10.   Wasn't too bad in the end..... communication is the key here......

reviews.title: Propre, accueil et piscine très agréables
reviews.positives: tres récent donc tout propre avec un parking et une piscine très agréable pour se rafraîchir… le personnel est très sympathique et avenant.
reviews.negatives: sur la route pour hoi an, mais pas d’attrait particulier à proximité.

reviews.title: Okay.
reviews.text: I made a reservation because it was close to 빈원더 and I am very satisfied. The family room is spacious and clean. There is a local restaurant across the hotel, making breakfast convenient and tasty. There are many sugarcane shops and local restaurants as well. It is a quiet rural village. 빈원더 was not as good as I expected.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Beste ontbijt dat we de laatste weken in de Vietnamese hotels hebben gehad. Buffet met ook voldoende Europesche keuzes. Kamer is niet zo groot maar heel efficient ingericht. Toppunt is toch wel dat je vanuit je bed over de stad uitkijkt.
reviews.negatives: Geen waterkoker en receptie is op de zesde verdieping in een groot gebouw, dat is even zoeken.

reviews.title: 1 week tourists
reviews.text: There is still rooms to improve

reviews.title: Acceptable
reviews.positives: 一点都不满意，工作忙到晚上十点多才回到酒店check in，前台连个鬼影都没有，打电话都关机。害得我到處臨时再找其他的住宿。
reviews.negatives: 没人可以联系，电话关机

reviews.title: Good stay near VinWonders Nam Hoi An
reviews.text: We booked this hotel as a base for visiting the nearby VinWonders and it served the purpose. The room was modern, clean and had everything we needed. This hotel mostly caters to the local market. The surrounding village has some good local food, nobody speaks English but you can get by with Google translate and people are very friendly. Kids enjoyed the pool. Simple, cheap stay but wouldn’t recommend as a base for Hoi An as too far.

reviews.title: 值得入住
reviews.positives: 環境清潔，房間夠大清潔度高。價格優勝，地理位置極佳，近水上樂園。附近餐館檔口咖啡超級美味！價錢十分便宜，好味！
reviews.negatives: 水壓不大，沖涼水慢細。乾濕不分離，雖然有塊玻璃隔了一小位置，作用不正。床上用品清潔度不高，有頭髮有污漬，有改善空間。游泳池小，有一大批本地人玩水。此4點就是取不了滿分的地方。

reviews.title: I'm not able to provide a direct translation for that phrase as it seems to be unclear or possibly misspelled. Please provide a correct version for translation.
reviews.text: I only came to spend one day at Vinpearl Land, but it's really hot and the sun is blazing. I'm trying to move to a shaded area, but it doesn't feel good. It seems like it won't get better.

reviews.title: 去VinWonders 的最佳住宿！
reviews.positives: 非常滿意！！！住宿環境乾淨、非常新、房間舒適、有陽台還有游泳池！員工友善、溝通方便！離VinWonders很近搭車約5分鐘，交通便利！這區屬於郊區沒有可以逛街的，但對於去樂園來說十分方便！
reviews.negatives: 位置稍微偏僻，附近沒有可以逛的，有些可惜！

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text: The hotel is clean, the room is spacious, and has all the amenities; I stayed in a room with a balcony, so it's very airy. The hotel also has a swimming pool. The staff is very enthusiastic and lovely. The prices are cheap. The only drawback is that the location is far from the center; the road back to the hotel from the old town at night is a bit quiet, so if you go out, you should return early; it takes about 20 minutes to get back from the old town to the hotel. If you stay at the hotel, it's very close to Vinwonders. If I have the chance, I will definitely stop by again 🥰

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.negatives: 빈윈더스 가기 위해서 잠시 잠만 자기 위해 선택했던 곳인데 화장실 천장도 뚫려있어서 다른것들이 튀어나올까봐 무서웠고.. 아침에는 로비에서 사람들이 너무 시끄러워서 잠을 못잤어요 ㅠ

reviews.title: I used it to go to the Bin Wonders.
reviews.text: It was around 6000 yen for a 2-night stay. It was very cheap, the room was clean, and it was sufficient since I just played at VinWonders and slept. Breakfast was not provided, so I had pho at a modest restaurant in front of the hotel. It was delicious. The laundry service was exceptionally cheap at 30,000 dong per kilogram, which was very helpful. The staff at the reception was also very kind. Considering the price, it was very good.

reviews.title: Worth experiencing
reviews.text: The room is clean, spacious, has a balcony, a firm spring mattress that is very comfortable to sleep on, and a children's pool, located near Vin Wonder.

reviews.negatives: Phòng hơi nhỏ

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.text:
Advantages: Clean room, enthusiastic and pleasant staff. Affordable price, TV with Netflix but I couldn't open it, watching YouTube was okay.  
Disadvantages: The soundproofing of the room is not very good.  
Amenities: There is a beach nearby but in the morning it can smell a bit fishy due to fishing, it's better to go around 6 AM after fishing or closer to Vinpearl beach. The beach is quite empty so having a float would be safer. There is a delicious Pho restaurant across from the hotel. There’s a spa, hair salon, and nail salon next to the hotel open from early morning to evening, which is very convenient.

reviews.title: It's nice to go to Bean Wonders.
reviews.text: Since I was going out to play all day anyway, I booked for the purpose of staying at Vin Wonders, and it was nice to move to Hoi An afterward and stay for about a day. The bed was comfortable for my back, and it was great.

Có bể bơi nhỏ ở sảnh, phòng sạch sẽ, đầy đủ tiện ích cơ bản, có hàng quán ngay đối diện để ăn sáng khỏi phải đi xa (bún, mì quảng, bánh canh). Buổi tối có thể đi xe ra bãi biển ăn tối.

reviews.title: The room is very nice.
reviews.text: Booked a hotel at a good price, a bit far from the old town, but in terms of the room experience, it's really worth the money spent. The room is clean, modern, aesthetically pleasing, and airy. I hope that next time I visit, the room rates haven't increased.

The rooms are spacious, with a swimming pool and a lush garden that provides an absolute sense of relaxation. The staff is friendly and attentive, offering full support. The parking lot is spacious. There is a garden for large family BBQ parties. The quality is great, and the prices are very reasonable, around 330k-450k per room if booked through Agoda.

reviews.title: So here's where to stay when you visit Hoi An.
reviews.text:
New, modern, equipped and clean room.  
Staff are enthusiastic, friendly, and assist guests quickly and promptly.  
Location is easy to find, close to many restaurants and VinWonder Hoi An.

reviews.title: Peaceful, immaculate, friendly
reviews.text:
A new and beautifully designed and decorated hotel. The room is bright and spacious. The bathroom is perfect too - it has a rain shower and lots of hot water. 

Everything is sparklingly clean. 

Very friendly staff. 

The area is quiet - it's on the edge of the town but walkable if it's not too hot. Grab car works here and costs about 30,000 VND / £1 GBP to get to the centre and the beach if you don't want to walk.   

I will come back.

reviews.title: Thật tuyệt vời và đáng giá
reviews.positives: Rất sạch sẽ, phòng mới và rộng rãi, tiện nghi đầy đủ, giá cả hợp lý . Thuận tiện đi qa Vinpearl

reviews.title: A worthy destination!
reviews.text: We had a great business trip experience staying at this hotel: with friendly staff, clean hotel, affordable and beautiful, and a wonderful jacuzzi pool to relax after a hot working day. If you want to visit Vipeal Hoi An, it's perfect, very close to the hotel. You should come and experience it!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách sạn mới và rất sạch sẽ, tuy nhỏ nhưng xinh xắn, kiến trúc hiện đại. Tôi rất hài lòng.

reviews.title: I recommend a clean and budget-friendly accommodation.
reviews.text: We arrived at 00:30 by a night flight. The desk was friendly even though we arrived in the early morning. We used three rooms, and one of them was upgraded to a triple room. However, when I woke up in the morning and took a walk around the neighborhood, the locals looked at us curiously. It seemed like they found outsiders fascinating since it was a remote area. The next day, we stayed at Vinpearl Resort, which was very close, and I think I will definitely use this place again next time. I recommend it!

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Vị trí khách sạn gần VinWonders Nam Hội An và thuận tiện để di chuyển đến Phố cổ Hội An.  
Phòng sạch sẽ, đầy đủ tiện nghi, có hồ bơi. 
Bạn lễ tân hỗ trợ mình rất nhiệt tình.
Xung quanh khách sạn có nhiều lựa chọn ăn uống với giá cả rất hợp lý.
Rất thích! Chắc chắn sẽ ghé lại khi có dịp đến Hội An.

reviews.title: Clean accommodation - affordable - high quality
reviews.text: I have been and experienced.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Ban đầu mình tưởng ks nằm biệt lập nhưng xung quanh vẫn có nhiều dân cư và khu vực ăn uống, bạn lễ tân rất nhiệt tình hỗ trợ gia đình mình, điều bất tiện nhất có lẽ là xung quanh khó tìm siêu thị mini hay tạp hoá

reviews.title: Best place for staying
reviews.text:
The best place for the best price in town. 
Rooms are clean. 
Customer service is very friendly, warm, and convenient. 
25 minutes to Hoi An. 
Green taxi is great for using in this area.

reviews.title: Rất hài lòng
reviews.positives: Giá rẻ, khách sạn mới, đẹp, sạch sẽ, phòng rộng, thoáng, sáng, nhân viên nhiệt tình thân thiện
reviews.negatives: NO

reviews.title: Review Thuấn Huệ Hotel
reviews.text: The hotel is very new, with minimalist yet luxurious rooms that are clean, spacious, and fully equipped. When I went, there was a very enthusiastic and cheerful receptionist. Overall, it is definitely worth experiencing.

reviews.title: Tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: Giá rẻ, khách sạn mới, đẹp, sạch sẽ, phòng rộng, thoáng, sáng, nhân viên nhiệt tình thân thiện
reviews.negatives: Miễn chê

reviews.title: Beautiful. Affordable. Close to Bin Pearl.
reviews.text: I was surprised by the beautiful and lovely hotel. There are dining places around, but it became difficult to go out at night, so I think it's a good idea to bring something with you. However, I felt reassured because there were instant noodles in the minibar. I arrived at night and moved to Bin Pearl in the morning, but I wanted to stay longer. In the morning, there was a restaurant right in front, and the bun? was delicious.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách sạn mới, sạch sẽ thơm tho. 10 điểm

reviews.title: Nice new hotel in the village
reviews.text: I stayed two nights. It was nice. The hotel is new and clean with swimming pool. The people in the village a nice and easy. Big balcony, nice to sit in the evening listening to nature. Vin Wonders adventure park is near. A little bit expensive to go back to Danang by taxi 500 thousand dong.

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách sạn đẹp mới sạch sẽ, chủ thì thân thiện

reviews.title: phong minh da bi huy
reviews.text: Dat qua agoda và bi huy phong vi li do toi tre. Nen khach san da ba'n phong minh cho khach khac. Bo' tay

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: KHÁCH SẠN mới xây nên sạch sẽ,

reviews.title: Hot n too cold
reviews.text: 呢間酒店唔值得租用,進入房間已經見到一把風扇企扇，相信他們知道房間的冷氣不足，才會有這樣的安排。原來房間有冷氣機，但差不多，只有微弱的冷氣，整晚房間都很熱，另外早上發現冷氣機漏水在房間內，情況不理想。全間房間只有一卷廁紙提供，而且是上手用剩的，房間不太乾淨，有昆蟲。床很硬好像木板般。露台玻璃破裂，很殘舊。全間房只有一個位於洗手間的垃圾桶，不夠位扔垃圾。是一次極劣質的體驗。

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Khách sạn mới, sạch sẽ. Nhân viên lễ tân nhiệt tình, thân thiện. Highly recommend.

reviews.title: 與價錢成正比
reviews.text: 只要期望這個價錢的服務就可以了

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Nhân viên nhiệt tình, phòng ốc sạch đẹp

reviews.title: 골프칠때 좋음
reviews.text: 빈펄 골프장 가기 편함. 빈펄 골프 전기차가 호텔까지 무료로 픽업 옵니다. 좋아요.

reviews.title: một trải nghiệm rất tuyệt vời
reviews.positives: tôi tính tìm chỗ ở tại tp tam kỳ mà ko biết sao tìm được phòng chỗ ks này. cách tam kỳ xa xa và cách hội an gần gần. trải nghiệm rất tốt. ks mới có hồ bơi. hải sản xung quanh rẻ lắm…

reviews.title: 괜찮은 숙소입니다.
reviews.text:
방의 시설이나 수영장이 괜찮고 직원들도 상당히 친절했습니다.
단, 주변에 편의 시설이 없어 현지에 적응이 안된분은 식사하실 재료를 구해가세요

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives: Phòng thoáng, rộng, sạch sẽ
reviews.negatives: hồ bơi hơi nhỏ

reviews.title: 그래도 이 가격이면 괜찮은데 주변에 진짜 아무것도 없음
reviews.text: 빈원더스에 놀다가 잠만 자려고 예약했는데, 조식도 안 나오는데 주변에 마땅한 식당이나 세탁소나 마사지샵이  없음. 그냥 어느동네에 호텔이 있는거임. 가격이 워낙싸니 진짜 잠만 잔다면 괜찮을지도. 본인은 괜찮았으나 아이들이 싫어해서 요금지불한거 포기하고 숙박을 안하고 다른호텔가서 잤음

reviews.title: Exceptional
reviews.positives:
Hotel był dla nas samotną wyspą wśród otaczającej nas zewsząd powodzi. Typowa miejscówka do zanocowania w długiej trasie. Wokół sporo tanich knajpek. Zasadniczo wszystko ok. Najważniejsze że działała suszarka i można było chociaż pozornie wysuszyć rzeczy przed dalszą motocyklową trasą.
Balkon spoks.

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.text:
새벽 5시만 되면 베트남어 방송이 나옵니다.
어린시절 동네마다 들리던 새마을 노래처럼 "새벽 종이 울렸네~" 잠에 예민하신 분들은 피하시는게 ㅎㅎ

reviews.title: Middle of nowhere just stay in Hoi An
reviews.positives: Hotel is new and fresh, good rooms
reviews.negatives: No food option in the hotel or anywhere close to the hotel.

reviews.title: 깨끗한 숙소 추천합니다.
reviews.text:
빈펄 골프장인근에 위치한 깨끗하고 가성비 좋은 호텔입니다.
주변에 별다른 시설이 없는것이 아쉽지만 베트남 로컬여행이나 빈펄리조트주변숙소를 찾으신다면 강력히 추전드립니다.

reviews.title: a costly option in the middle of nowhere
reviews.positives: the hotel is new. the room was spacious. they had a good amount of hot water for 3 tired people.
reviews.negatives: the location - it is surrounded by cemeteries. There is only one good local restaurant nearby. we had a quadruple room with only one chair inside. the staff doesn't speak English. the swimming pool is rather a pond by the road. the beds were tough. not enough sockets (only 1 per bed). there wasn't anybody at the reception desk since 8 PM. I had no idea how to find any assistance in case of an emergency.

reviews.title: 굿굿
reviews.text: 신규호텔이라 깔끔해서 좋았습니다

reviews.title: Got there on a wet day. Brilliant staff, comfortable stay.
reviews.positives: Was easy to get to and had amenities as needed. Staff where also great
reviews.negatives: Needs a bit of a clean. Not much just a bit to bring it up to standard

reviews.title: 가성비 좋아요
reviews.text: 빈원더스 일정이 있을때 잠만 자기 딱인것 같아요!

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives:
Large, comfortable studio. Pool outside the room. Very friendly and helpful staff! 
Go to Sea restaurant, 2 doors down. Tasty food, very friendly and 1 girl there speaks English.
Coffee from diagonally across the road is great.
reviews.negatives:
The hotel is in the middle of nowhere. 
You MUST have your own transport, or hire a scooter.

reviews.title: 가성비 갑
reviews.text: 이쪽에 비지니스가 있는 출장객에는 이만한 호텔이 없다. 최고이다.

reviews.title: Very good

reviews.title: 빈원더스 가기좋은곳
reviews.text: 하루잘 요량으로 들렸는데 가성비 최고였어요~~

reviews.title: Very good
reviews.positives: Huge room with direct access to the pool.
reviews.negatives:
Location.
In the middle of nowhere.
About 3 km to the sea.
And the beach is so so.
If the hotel was by the sea, I would give 10 points.

reviews.title: Good
reviews.text: Big room , clear and quite

reviews.title: Nice hotel with cheap price
reviews.positives: New hotel with cheap price. Clean and quiet.
reviews.negatives: Water color is kinda rusty. Owner has mentioned that it is due to water supply system.

reviews.title: Above average
reviews.text: Ks mới, trang thiết bị mới. Phòng chật, điều hoà bật 16 độ từ trưa đến tối vẫn ko mát. Hành lang rất nóng mặc dù ở vào tháng 10. Nước nóng để tắm ko có sẵn, ks chỉ bật vào chiều tối, mặc dù đã yêu cầu nhưng vẫn bị tắm nước lạnh. Đây là lần đầu tiên đến 1 ks mà ko có nước nóng để tắm. Sẽ ko trở lại.
reviews.response:
Dạ khách sạn luôn ghi nhận mọi sự đánh giá từ khách hàng để cải thiện tốt hơn ạ. Khách sạn xin phản hồi một số sự cố liên quan đến sự không hài lòng của quý khách ạ. 
Khách sạn luôn cung cấp nước nóng liên tục đến với khách, mình chỉ cần bật về phía trái tầm khoản 2-3phút sẽ có nước nóng ngay ạ. Một số sai sót về việc điều khiển điều hòa bị chỉnh sai chế độ lạnh dẫn đến không đáp ứng đủ độ lạnh cho phòng. Mọi thắc mắc về cách thức sử dụng trang thiêt bị trong phòng, lễ tân sẽ lên xử lí và hướng dẫn ngay khi khách yêu cầu về phòng của mình ạ. Khách sạn gửi lời xin lỗi đến với quý khách, ghi nhận toàn bộ mọi sự việc và chịu hoàn toàn trách nhiệm về việc thiếu sự hướng dẫn đến với khách hàng dẫn đến tình trạng không mong muốn trên. Rất mong quý khách hàng thông cảm và thấu hiểu cho toàn bộ đội ngũ của khách sạn. Mọi sự đóng góp ý kiến của quý khách luôn góp phần cho chúng tôi xem xét, điều chỉnh và cải thiện tốt hơn nữa để mang đến trải nghiệm của quý khách một cách tốt hơn. Xin cảm ơn!
